privacy: Artwork, projects and preferences stay on the device unless the person using AIR-DROW explicitly exports, shares or starts an optional AI creation.
releaseGate: npm run vercel:build validates source integrity, local hand assets, bilingual markup, runtime coverage, export/gesture tests, legacy compatibility, version/cache contracts, and generated production output.
support: Use Settings > About App to review app readiness, hand drawing readiness, language, release information and developer profile.
name: AIR-DROW Hand Input Reliability Edition
summary: A complete local drawing source package with deliberate hand-drawing intent, safe tracking recovery and compact mobile scanner feedback.
